sections.title: Anthropic Claude
sections.text: OnDemand data source for Anthropic Claude API interactions.
list: Config fields: connection_name, api_key, model, temperature, max_tokens, system_prompt, api_base_url, timeout
Output: Returns a model response for each incoming prompt (on-demand).

sections.title: Typical workflow
sections.intro: Configure Anthropic Claude with the connection fields and run it as part of a BrainBoost pipeline.

cards.title: Connect
cards.text: Provide connection_name, api_key, model, temperature, max_tokens, system_prompt, api_base_url, timeout in the connection form.

cards.title: Fetch
cards.text: Run `fetch()` to ingest, transform, or stream data.

cards.title: Consume
cards.text: Use the emitted items in downstream indexing, search, or automation steps.

items.q: What do I need to configure?
items.a: At minimum: connection_name, api_key, model, temperature, max_tokens, system_prompt, api_base_url, timeout. Additional fields may be optional depending on your use case.
Returns a model response for each incoming prompt (on-demand).
Outputs are emitted to downstream subscribers in the BrainBoost pipeline. Some datasources also write artifacts (context files, catalogs, or exports) locally based on your configuration.

sections.title: Ready to use Anthropic Claude?
sections.text: Add it to your BrainBoost pipeline and start ingesting.
sections.subtext: Run this datasource locally with your own credentials and storage.
